TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ś°ĎŚĺ∑ÁĺÖ¬∑ś≥ĘśŹźŚąáŚą©(Sandro BotticelliÔľõAlessandro Filipepi,1445ŚĻī3śúą1śó•‚ÄĒ1510ŚĻī5śúą17śó•)śėĮ15 ". San-te-low.Po-ti-cye-li "Sandro BotticelliÔľõAlessandro Filipepi, 1445 a mihcaan 3 a bulad 1 a demiad katukuh 1510 a mihcaan 5 a bulad 17 a demiad" u 15 a lasubu a mihcaan tu sazikuzay ci Bow-low-lun-sa u singanganay nu mikulitay, Ow-cow u cumelakay nu nalimaan a misulitay saayaway a ziday ni Bow-low-lun-sa u zazikuzayay tu nu mikulitay a tademaw. malilid ni Ni-te-lan a nikulita tu nu tademaway, ci Pow-ti-cye-li nu I-ta-liay nu mapatayay a nikuliday tu nu tademaw. u singanganay nu situngusay a nikulitan "lalud" atu "kalecuhan ni Wiy-na-s". milawat tu nikauzipan ÁĒüŚĻ≥Á∂ďś≠∑ ś°ĎŚĺ∑ÁĺÖ¬∑ś≥ĘśŹźŚąáŚą©,ŚéüŚźćAlessandro Filipepi , . San-te-low.Po-ti-cye-li , nau ngangan Alessandro Filipepi "Ya-li-san-te-low.Bey-li-pey-piy" "Po-ti-cye-li u pacimi a ngangan niza, zuma a ngangan, u imim "adidi'ay a bakici. Po-ti-cye-li nilecuhan i I-Ta-li Bow-low-lun-sa hanu limaan misangaay a kusi tu cayay katalakaw ku nilaculan nu labuay a luma'. . saayaway aci Ma-suo.Bey-ni-ku-ay-la maladay minanam, misanga' tu kim ging a gazali, zikuz mala ni Bey-li-pu.Li-pi nu micudaday, u sakay pacuayay ni Li-pi, pahabay ciniza tu tatamaan a wawa ni Li-pu ci Pow-pi-li-po.nuo. Po-ti cye-li hina madiput ni Mey-ti-ci a lalumaan atu cabay nu heni amin. . uyni kalalitin tu cence atu lalangawan u sasangaan sasilitan niza u ahebalay. i 1481 a mihcaan, Pow-ti-cye-li matakus tayza i Lu-ma mikuli tu cabengay a kuli, uyni dada' ku sapiliyas niza tu Bow-low-sa taza i hekal mikulit. sakukamu ci Pow-ti-cye-li namakay 15 a lasubu a mihcaan 90 a zidayan a malingatu mikilul tu wayway "ni Sa-wa-nay-low-la", i sazikuzay niza a mihcaan ni kulitan tu nu tinsikiway a matineng, u sazikuzay a nikulitan niza nayay ku nipakazali a waway, naka mutesek ku pikilul tu nu kiwkay.i 15 lasubu a mihcaan 80 a ziday atu 90 a zidayan, ci Pow-ti-vy nu Bow-low-lun-sa nu singanganay tu kucungay. mahapinang ku nu kiwkayay sibalucu'ay tu nu tademaw, matumes ku nu tademaway a angil. zazikuzay nu mihcaan nikulitan yadah macunus ku nu kasumamaday a nakamuan a kungku mala u sasulitan, tada mialaay tu nu kasumamadan nu Si-la atu Low-ma tu nakamuan nu babalaki a sasulitan. kapah ku waway , salungan, damsay kahemekan. . u micidekay sa yadah ku piyung niza tu nu kiwkayay mabidang tu ku zumaay a kiwkay a sasulitan, sibalucu' sa amikulit tu nayay ku zikuz a tademaw, sakay anuaya a nikulitan tabaki ku nikalilid tu '"lalud" atu "kalecuhan ni Wi-na-s" u tanengay amaazih ku wayway nu nikulitan tu tungusa nikulitan niza. ciniza sa nu Ow-cow nu saayaway nu kacumelakan nu nalimaan a nisulitan u wayway ci Boe-low-lun-sa nu nikulitay tu sazikuzayay tu nu mikulitay a tademaw.1470ŚĻī, . 1470 a mihcaan, sakaku satu ciniza, patizeng tu pisakakawawan tu nu uzaip a pikulitan, dadawaw a saka namuhan nu lumaay ni Mey-ti-ci, yadah ku piciwmung cinizaan tu nikulitan. atu icelangay nu lumaay ni Mey-ti-ci mahiza tu kapah ku kacacayat u mikulitay madiput tu nu cence, a siaca ku nikulitan. namahini miawas tu kacacayat nuynian, ci Pow-ti-cye-te makatiyung tu Bow-low-lun-sa nu kakitaan a syakay atu singanganay nu nalimaan misulitay, mitiyung tu mahicahcaay a tineng, padas tu aazihan, mala u kucungay niza u micidakay kapahay ku nalimaan, mukelatay tabaki tanektek, salungan mukelat kulikulitan u bacu nu kakitaan.
S.PHON: ********(sandro botti ¶…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺi*ar~…ĺ…ôssandro fir~…ĺip…ôpi,********************)*** ". san-t…ô-r~…ĺow.po-ti- ¶j…ô-r~…ĺi "sandro botti ¶…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺi*ar~…ĺ…ôssandro fir~…ĺip…ôpi, **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad" u ** a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan tu sazikuzaj ¶i bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-sa u siŇčaŇčanaj nu mikur~…ĺitaj, ow- ¶ow u ¶um…ôr~…ĺakaj nu nar~…ĺimaan a misur~…ĺitaj saajawaj a zidaj ni bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-sa u zazikuzajaj tu nu mikur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw. mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ni ni-t…ô-r~…ĺan a nikur~…ĺita tu nu tad…ômawaj, ¶i pow-ti- ¶j…ô-r~…ĺi nu i-ta-r~…ĺiaj nu mapatajaj a nikur~…ĺidaj tu nu tad…ômaw. u siŇčaŇčanaj nu situŇčusaj a nikur~…ĺitan "r~…ĺar~…ĺud" atu "kar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ni wij-na-s". mir~…ĺawat tu nikauzipan **** ********,**ar~…ĺ…ôssandro fir~…ĺip…ôpi , . san-t…ô-r~…ĺow.po-ti- ¶j…ô-r~…ĺi , nau ŇčaŇčan ar~…ĺ…ôssandro fir~…ĺip…ôpi "ja-r~…ĺi-san-t…ô-r~…ĺow.b…ô-r~…ĺi-p…ô-pij" "po-ti- ¶j…ô-r~…ĺi u pa ¶imi a ŇčaŇčan niza, zuma a ŇčaŇčan, u imim "adidi Ē~ °aj a baki ¶i. po-ti- ¶j…ô-r~…ĺi nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i i-ta-r~…ĺi bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-sa ńßanu r~…ĺimaan misaŇčaaj a kusi tu ¶ajaj katar~…ĺakaw ku nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan nu r~…ĺabuaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. . saajawaj a ¶i ma-suo.b…ô-ni-ku-aj-r~…ĺa mar~…ĺadaj minanam, misaŇča Ē~ ° tu kim giŇč a gazar~…ĺi, zikuz mar~…ĺa ni b…ô-r~…ĺi-pu.r~…ĺi-pi nu mi ¶udadaj, u sakaj pa ¶uajaj ni r~…ĺi-pi, pańßabaj ¶iniza tu tatamaan a wawa ni r~…ĺi-pu ¶i pow-pi-r~…ĺi-po.nuo. po-ti ¶j…ô-r~…ĺi ńßina madiput ni m…ô-ti- ¶i a r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan atu ¶abaj nu ńß…ôni amin. . ujni kar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ¶…ôn ¶…ô atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan u sasaŇčaan sasir~…ĺitan niza u ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj. i **** a mińß ¶aan, pow-ti- ¶j…ô-r~…ĺi matakus tajza i r~…ĺu-ma mikur~…ĺi tu ¶ab…ôŇčaj a kur~…ĺi, ujni dada Ē~ ° ku sapir~…ĺijas niza tu bow-r~…ĺow-sa taza i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ mikur~…ĺit. sakukamu ¶i pow-ti- ¶j…ô-r~…ĺi namakaj ** a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan ** a zidajan a mar~…ĺiŇčatu mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu wajwaj "ni sa-wa-naj-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺa", i sazikuzaj niza a mińß ¶aan ni kur~…ĺitan tu nu tinsikiwaj a matin…ôŇč, u sazikuzaj a nikur~…ĺitan niza najaj ku nipakazar~…ĺi a wawaj, naka mut…ôs…ôk ku pikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu nu kiwkaj.i ** r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan ** a zidaj atu ** a zidajan, ¶i pow-ti-*j nu bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-sa nu siŇčaŇčanaj tu ku ¶uŇčaj. mańßapinaŇč ku nu kiwkajaj sibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aj tu nu tad…ômaw, matum…ôs ku nu tad…ômawaj a aŇčir~…ĺ. zazikuzaj nu mińß ¶aan nikur~…ĺitan jadańß ma ¶unus ku nu kasumamadaj a nakamuan a kuŇčku mar~…ĺa u sasur~…ĺitan, tada miar~…ĺaaj tu nu kasumamadan nu si-r~…ĺa atu r~…ĺow-ma tu nakamuan nu babar~…ĺaki a sasur~…ĺitan. kapańß ku wawaj , sar~…ĺuŇčan, damsaj kańß…ôm…ôkan. . u mi ¶id…ôkaj sa jadańß ku pijuŇč niza tu nu kiwkajaj mabidaŇč tu ku zumaaj a kiwkaj a sasur~…ĺitan, sibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° sa amikur~…ĺit tu najaj ku zikuz a tad…ômaw, sakaj anuaja a nikur~…ĺitan tabaki ku nikar~…ĺir~…ĺid tu Ē~ °"r~…ĺar~…ĺud" atu "kar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ni wi-na-s" u tan…ôŇčaj amaazińß ku wajwaj nu nikur~…ĺitan tu tuŇčusa nikur~…ĺitan niza. ¶iniza sa nu ow- ¶ow nu saajawaj nu ka ¶um…ôr~…ĺakan nu nar~…ĺimaan a nisur~…ĺitan u wajwaj ¶i bo…ô-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-sa nu nikur~…ĺitaj tu sazikuzajaj tu nu mikur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw.*****, . **** a mińß ¶aan, sakaku satu ¶iniza, patiz…ôŇč tu pisakakawawan tu nu uzaip a pikur~…ĺitan, dadawaw a saka namuńßan nu r~…ĺumaaj ni m…ô-ti- ¶i, jadańß ku pi ¶iwmuŇč ¶inizaan tu nikur~…ĺitan. atu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj nu r~…ĺumaaj ni m…ô-ti- ¶i mańßiza tu kapańß ku ka ¶a ¶ajat u mikur~…ĺitaj madiput tu nu ¶…ôn ¶…ô, a sia ¶a ku nikur~…ĺitan. namańßini miawas tu ka ¶a ¶ajat nujnian, ¶i pow-ti- ¶j…ô-t…ô makatijuŇč tu bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-sa nu kakitaan a sjakaj atu siŇčaŇčanaj nu nar~…ĺimaan misur~…ĺitaj, mitijuŇč tu mańßi ¶ańß ¶aaj a tin…ôŇč, padas tu aazińßan, mar~…ĺa u ku ¶uŇčaj niza u mi ¶idakaj kapańßaj ku nar~…ĺimaan, muk…ôr~…ĺataj tabaki tan…ôkt…ôk, sar~…ĺuŇčan muk…ôr~…ĺat kur~…ĺikur~…ĺitan u ba ¶u nu kakitaan.
S.FORM: ś°ĎŚĺ∑ÁĺÖ¬∑ś≥ĘśŹźŚąáŚą©(Sandro BotticelliÔľõAlessandro Filipepi,1445ŚĻī3śúą1śó•‚ÄĒ1510ŚĻī5śúą17śó•)śėĮ15 ". San-te-low.Po-ti-cye-li "Sandro BotticelliÔľõAlessandro Filipepi, 1445 a mihcaan 3 a bulad 1 a demiad katukuh 1510 a mihcaan 5 a bulad 17 a demiad" u 15 a lasubu a mihcaan tu sazikuzay ci Bow-low-lun-sa u singanganay nu mikulitay, Ow-cow u cumelakay nu nalimaan a misulitay saayaway a ziday ni Bow-low-lun-sa u zazikuzayay tu nu mikulitay a tademaw. malilid ni Ni-te-lan a nikulita tu nu tademaway, ci Pow-ti-cye-li nu I-ta-liay nu mapatayay a nikuliday tu nu tademaw. u singanganay nu situngusay a nikulitan "lalud" atu "kalecuhan ni Wiy-na-s". milawat tu nikauzipan ÁĒüŚĻ≥Á∂ďś≠∑ ś°ĎŚĺ∑ÁĺÖ¬∑ś≥ĘśŹźŚąáŚą©,ŚéüŚźćAlessandro Filipepi , . San-te-low.Po-ti-cye-li , nau ngangan Alessandro Filipepi "Ya-li-san-te-low.Bey-li-pey-piy" "Po-ti-cye-li u pacimi a ngangan niza, zuma a ngangan, u imim "adidi'ay a bakici. Po-ti-cye-li nilecuhan i I-Ta-li Bow-low-lun-sa hanu limaan misangaay a kusi tu cayay katalakaw ku nilaculan nu labuay a luma'. . saayaway aci Ma-suo.Bey-ni-ku-ay-la maladay minanam, misanga' tu kim ging a gazali, zikuz mala ni Bey-li-pu.Li-pi nu micudaday, u sakay pacuayay ni Li-pi, pahabay ciniza tu tatamaan a wawa ni Li-pu ci Pow-pi-li-po.nuo. Po-ti cye-li hina madiput ni Mey-ti-ci a lalumaan atu cabay nu heni amin. . uyni kalalitin tu cence atu lalangawan u sasangaan sasilitan niza u ahebalay. i 1481 a mihcaan, Pow-ti-cye-li matakus tayza i Lu-ma mikuli tu cabengay a kuli, uyni dada' ku sapiliyas niza tu Bow-low-sa taza i hekal mikulit. sakukamu ci Pow-ti-cye-li namakay 15 a lasubu a mihcaan 90 a zidayan a malingatu mikilul tu wayway "ni Sa-wa-nay-low-la", i sazikuzay niza a mihcaan ni kulitan tu nu tinsikiway a matineng, u sazikuzay a nikulitan niza nayay ku nipakazali a waway, naka mutesek ku pikilul tu nu kiwkay.i 15 lasubu a mihcaan 80 a ziday atu 90 a zidayan, ci Pow-ti-vy nu Bow-low-lun-sa nu singanganay tu kucungay. mahapinang ku nu kiwkayay sibalucu'ay tu nu tademaw, matumes ku nu tademaway a angil. zazikuzay nu mihcaan nikulitan yadah macunus ku nu kasumamaday a nakamuan a kungku mala u sasulitan, tada mialaay tu nu kasumamadan nu Si-la atu Low-ma tu nakamuan nu babalaki a sasulitan. kapah ku waway , salungan, damsay kahemekan. . u micidekay sa yadah ku piyung niza tu nu kiwkayay mabidang tu ku zumaay a kiwkay a sasulitan, sibalucu' sa amikulit tu nayay ku zikuz a tademaw, sakay anuaya a nikulitan tabaki ku nikalilid tu '"lalud" atu "kalecuhan ni Wi-na-s" u tanengay amaazih ku wayway nu nikulitan tu tungusa nikulitan niza. ciniza sa nu Ow-cow nu saayaway nu kacumelakan nu nalimaan a nisulitan u wayway ci Boe-low-lun-sa nu nikulitay tu sazikuzayay tu nu mikulitay a tademaw.1470ŚĻī, . 1470 a mihcaan, sakaku satu ciniza, patizeng tu pisakakawawan tu nu uzaip a pikulitan, dadawaw a saka namuhan nu lumaay ni Mey-ti-ci, yadah ku piciwmung cinizaan tu nikulitan. atu icelangay nu lumaay ni Mey-ti-ci mahiza tu kapah ku kacacayat u mikulitay madiput tu nu cence, a siaca ku nikulitan. namahini miawas tu kacacayat nuynian, ci Pow-ti-cye-te makatiyung tu Bow-low-lun-sa nu kakitaan a syakay atu singanganay nu nalimaan misulitay, mitiyung tu mahicahcaay a tineng, padas tu aazihan, mala u kucungay niza u micidakay kapahay ku nalimaan, mukelatay tabaki tanektek, salungan mukelat kulikulitan u bacu nu kakitaan.

¶um…ôr~…ĺakaj nu nar~…ĺimaan a misur~…ĺitaj saajawaj a zidaj ni bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-sa u zazikuzajaj tu nu mikur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw. mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ni ni-t…ô-r~…ĺan a nikur~…ĺita tu nu tad…ômawaj, ¶i r~…ĺi-pi, pańßabaj ¶iniza tu tatamaan a wawa ni r~…ĺi-pu ¶i pow-pi-r~…ĺi-po.nuo. po-ti ¶j…ô-r~…ĺi ńßina madiput ni m…ô-ti- ¶i a r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan atu ¶abaj nu ńß…ôni amin. . ujni kar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ¶…ôn ¶…ô atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan u sasaŇčaan sasir~…ĺitan niza u ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj. i **** a mińß ¶aan, pow-ti- ¶j…ô-r~…ĺi matakus tajza i r~…ĺu-ma mikur~…ĺi tu ¶ab…ôŇčaj a kur~…ĺi, ujni dada Ē~ ° ku sapir~…ĺijas niza tu bow-r~…ĺow-sa taza i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ mikur~…ĺit. sakukamu ¶i pow-ti- ¶j…ô-r~…ĺi namakaj ** a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan ** a zidajan a mar~…ĺiŇčatu mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu wajwaj "ni sa-wa-naj-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺa", i sazikuzaj niza a mińß ¶aan ni kur~…ĺitan tu nu tinsikiwaj a matin…ôŇč, u sazikuzaj a nikur~…ĺitan niza najaj ku nipakazar~…ĺi a wawaj, naka mut…ôs…ôk ku pikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu nu kiwkaj.i ** r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan ** a zidaj atu ** a zidajan, ¶i pow-ti-*j nu bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-sa nu siŇčaŇčanaj tu ku ¶uŇčaj. mańßapinaŇč ku nu kiwkajaj sibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aj tu nu tad…ômaw, matum…ôs ku nu tad…ômawaj a aŇčir~…ĺ. zazikuzaj nu mińß ¶aan nikur~…ĺitan jadańß ma ¶unus ku nu kasumamadaj a nakamuan a kuŇčku mar~…ĺa u sasur~…ĺitan, tada miar~…ĺaaj tu nu kasumamadan nu si-r~…ĺa atu r~…ĺow-ma tu nakamuan nu babar~…ĺaki a sasur~…ĺitan. kapańß ku wawaj , sar~…ĺuŇčan, damsaj kańß…ôm…ôkan. . u mi ¶id…ôkaj sa jadańß ku pijuŇč niza tu nu kiwkajaj mabidaŇč tu ku zumaaj a kiwkaj a sasur~…ĺitan, sibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° tu tuŇčusa nikur~…ĺitan niza. ¶iniza sa nu ow- ¶ow nu saajawaj nu ka ¶um…ôr~…ĺakan nu nar~…ĺimaan a nisur~…ĺitan u wajwaj ¶i bo…ô-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-sa nu nikur~…ĺitaj tu sazikuzajaj tu nu mikur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw.*****, . **** a mińß ¶aan, sakaku satu ¶iniza, patiz…ôŇč tu pisakakawawan tu nu uzaip a pikur~…ĺitan, dadawaw a saka namuńßan nu r~…ĺumaaj ni m…ô-ti- ¶i, jadańß ku pi ¶iwmuŇč ¶inizaan tu nikur~…ĺitan. atu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj nu r~…ĺumaaj ni m…ô-ti- ¶i mańßiza tu kapańß ku ka ¶a ¶ajat u mikur~…ĺitaj madiput tu nu ¶…ôn ¶…ô, a sia ¶a ku nikur~…ĺitan. namańßini miawas tu ka ¶a ¶ajat nujnian, ¶i pow-ti- ¶j…ô-t…ô makatijuŇč tu bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-sa nu kakitaan a sjakaj atu siŇčaŇčanaj nu nar~…ĺimaan misur~…ĺitaj, mitijuŇč tu mańßi ¶ańß ¶aaj a tin…ôŇč, padas tu aazińßan, mar~…ĺa u ku ¶uŇčaj niza u mi ¶idakaj kapańßaj ku nar~…ĺimaan, muk…ôr~…ĺataj tabaki tan…ôkt…ôk, sar~…ĺuŇčan muk…ôr~…ĺat kur~…ĺikur~…ĺitan u ba ¶u nu kakitaan.
